workLog.action: Selected issue #1754 (priority:P2, only available priority tier; assignee rjmurillo-bot; agent-qa, area-prompts) per branch context. Confirmed no existing PR via skill search.
workLog.outcome: Acceptance criteria from issue body: create .claude/rules/code-quality.md (~8-10KB) merging Clean Code + Code Complete, dedupe overlap (naming, small functions, guard clauses, dead code), add unique sections (code smells/SOLID/test readability from Clean Code; defensive programming/table-driven logic/variable scope from Code Complete), set alwaysApply: true.

workLog.action: Surveyed repo for existing .claude/rules/ pattern, alwaysApply frontmatter precedent, and rule loaders. None exist; this is the first rules file. Confirmed .markdownlint-cli2.yaml applies (no exclusion for .claude/rules path).
workLog.outcome: Greenfield create. Markdownlint constraints: MD040 fenced code language required, MD041 first-line heading required, MD025 single H1 with frontmatter accommodation, MD004 dash list marker, MD046 fenced code blocks.

workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/code-quality.md with frontmatter (description + alwaysApply: true) and 13 sections: Naming, Functions, Guard Clauses, Delete Dead Code, Code Smells, SOLID, Test Readability, Defensive Programming, Table-Driven Logic, Variable Scope, Comments, Error Handling, Quick Self-Review checklist.
workLog.outcome: 12418 bytes single file. Dedup applied: naming + small functions + guard clauses + dead code each covered exactly once.
